description: On-premises data gateway configuration for connecting Power BI to the consolidated Azure SQL Database.

gateway.name: Contoso-PBI-Gateway
gateway.description: Primary gateway cluster for Power BI dataset refresh against Azure SQL.

connectionPooling.description: Pool connections to Azure SQL to reduce overhead during refresh. Max pool size should accommodate parallel partition refresh.

timeoutSettings.description: Connection timeout is for establishing the link; command timeout covers individual query execution during refresh.

resourceLimits.description: Resource limits to prevent the gateway from becoming a bottleneck. Adjust based on VM size.

highAvailability.description: Two-node cluster for failover. Ensure both nodes have identical data source configurations.
